Google Introduces AI Agent Prototype That Can Browse The Web
data.description: Google unveils AI prototype Mariner, using Gemini 2.0 technology to automate tasks and follow complex instructions. Available to select users.

data.title: Demystifying Zurn Elkay Water: Insights From 5 Analyst Reviews
E2open Faces Organic Growth Challenges, Debt Overhang: Goldman Sachs Downgrades Stock
data.description: Goldman Sachs analyst downgrades E2open Parent Holdings from Neutral to Sell, lowering price target from $3.5 to $2.9. Despite undemanding valuation, lack of growth visibility and high leverage will likely weigh on stock.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Initiates Similarweb Coverage, Product Upgrades Inspire Bullish Take
data.description: Goldman Sachs analyst initiates coverage on Similarweb Ltd with Buy rating and $16 price target due to strong revenue growth and DaaS offering.
